attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM         ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD  ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_WTD_BKGS_NET_AMT           ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_MTD_BKGS_NET_AMT           ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_QTD_BKGS_NET_AMT           ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_Q1_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_Q2_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_Q3_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_Q4_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_YTD_BKGS_NET_AMT           ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_PREV_WEEK_BKGS_NET_AMT     ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_PREV_MTH_BKGS_NET_AMT      ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_PREV_QTR_BKGS_NET_AMT      ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ,
  MT_OVLY_AGGR.DSV_FLG                       ,
  CASE WHEN MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 
    WHEN MT_OVLY_AGGR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
    ELSE DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
   END AS RD_DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  CASE WHEN END_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
    ELSE END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
      END AS RD_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  CASE WHEN BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
       ELSE BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
      END AS RD_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
       ELSE SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
      END AS RD_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
    ELSE SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
      END AS RD_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
  CASE WHEN OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 
       ELSE OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
   END AS RD_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  ,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
 FROM 
 ( 
 SELECT 
 PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM,
 SERVICE_FLG AS SERVICE_FLG,
 OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
 BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD AS BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 SUM(BKGS_CURRENT_WEEK) AS DV_WTD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS_CURRENT_MTH) AS DV_MTD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS_CURR_QTR) AS DV_QTD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS_Q1_QTR) AS DV_Q1_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
 SUM(BKGS_Q2_QTR) AS DV_Q2_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
 SUM(BKGS_Q3_QTR) AS DV_Q3_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
 SUM(BKGS_Q4_QTR) AS DV_Q4_BKGS_NET_AMT            ,
 SUM(BKGS_CURRENT_YEAR) AS DV_YTD_BKGS_NET_AMT           ,
 SUM(BKGS_PREV_WEEK) AS DV_PREV_WEEK_BKGS_NET_AMT     ,
 SUM(BKGS_PREV_MTH) AS DV_PREV_MTH_BKGS_NET_AMT      ,
 SUM(BKGS_PREV_QTR) AS DV_PREV_QTR_BKGS_NET_AMT      ,
 DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
 DV_FMV_FLG AS DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
 CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG AS CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
 DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG AS DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,
 DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG AS DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ,
 DSV_FLG,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  ,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
 PRODUCT_KEY,
 END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 SERVICE_FLG,
 OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 --OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_CURRENT_YEAR,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.CURR_QTR_NUM=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_CURR_QTR,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.Q1_QTR_NUM=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_Q1_QTR,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.Q2_QTR_NUM=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_Q2_QTR,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.Q3_QTR_NUM=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_Q3_QTR,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.Q4_QTR_NUM=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_Q4_QTR,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_QTR_INT=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_PREV_QTR,
 
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_CURRENT_MTH,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_PREV_MTH,
 
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_CURRENT_WEEK,
 CASE WHEN FISCAL_VARIABLE.PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_INT=TOTAL_BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT THEN  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END BKGS_PREV_WEEK,
 
 DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 DV_FMV_FLG,
 DSV_FLG,
 CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  ,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 BKGS.OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
 BKGS.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 BKGS.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 SUM(BKGS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PCT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
 BKGS.DSV_FLG,
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
 BRIDGE.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  ,
NSW.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y
 ON BKGS.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
 AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 1
 AND BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'
	   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS BRIDGE
		ON BRIDGE.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD           =BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD    
        INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN    NSW
ON NSW.PRODUCT_KEY                   =BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY   
 AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  =NSW.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
AND NSW.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
 GROUP BY 
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 BKGS.OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
 BKGS.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 BKGS.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
 BKGS.DSV_FLG,
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
  BRIDGE.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  ,
  NSW.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD 
 ) TOTAL_BKGS,
 (
 SELECT 
 FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT CURR_QTR_NUM,
 CAST((FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT||TRIM(1)) AS INTEGER)  Q1_QTR_NUM,
 CAST((FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT||TRIM(2)) AS INTEGER)  Q2_QTR_NUM,
 CAST((FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT||TRIM(3)) AS INTEGER)  Q3_QTR_NUM,
 CAST((FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT||TRIM(4)) AS INTEGER)  Q4_QTR_NUM,
 PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_QTR_INT,
 FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,    
 FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
 PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_INT 
 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR
 WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_WEEK_FLAG='Y'
 GROUP BY 
 FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
 Q1_QTR_NUM,
 Q2_QTR_NUM,
 Q3_QTR_NUM,
 Q4_QTR_NUM,
 PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_QTR_INT,
 FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,    
 FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
 PREV_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_INT
 ) FISCAL_VARIABLE 
 ) TOTAL_BOOKINGS_DATA
 GROUP BY
 PRODUCT_KEY,
 END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 SERVICE_FLG,
 OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 --OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 DV_FMV_FLG,
 DSV_FLG,
 CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  ,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
 HAVING
 SUM(BKGS_CURRENT_YEAR)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_CURR_QTR)<>0 OR
 SUM(BKGS_Q1_QTR)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_Q2_QTR)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_Q3_QTR)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_Q4_QTR)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_PREV_QTR)<> 0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_CURRENT_MTH)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_PREV_MTH)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_CURRENT_WEEK)<>0 OR 
 SUM(BKGS_PREV_WEEK)<>0 ) MT_OVLY_AGGR
